name: Data Security for Confidential Information
text: The Recipient shall implement and maintain appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect the Confidential Information against unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, or destruction, in accordance with applicable Indian laws.
invalid_if: The agreement does not involve the transfer or access to data that requires security measures.
Specific data security measures are exhaustively defined in another part of the agreement, rendering this general clause redundant or conflicting.
title: Data Security
dispute_hotspots: Ransomware attack — receiving party's systems compromised — is it liable for CI breach?
72-hour breach notification — operationally difficult for many organisations
